title: Who the hell is this character
display_title: Who the hell is this character
wikitext:
[]: Who the hell is this character??? Post by scwizard » Fri Apr 06, 2007 3:11 pm This is snipped from the movie poster for Death and Rebirth . There's a character on it that I've never heard anything about.

[]: Post by Defectron » Fri Apr 06, 2007 3:14 pm its touji

[]: Re: Who the hell is this character??? Post by Executor » Fri Apr 06, 2007 3:17 pm scwizard wrote: This is snipped from the movie poster for Death and Rebirth . There's a character on it that I've never heard anything about.

[]: Post by scwizard » Fri Apr 06, 2007 3:18 pm He looks different. I should really rewatch the series. It'd be very strange if he ended up being a pilot (and actually piloting) in rebuild.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Fri Apr 06, 2007 3:47 pm Yeah, it really doesn't look much like him. I was also confused as to why Touji was included here since he is only a pilot in one episode and doesn't actually get to do anything.

[]: Post by Executor » Fri Apr 06, 2007 4:41 pm BrikHaus81 wrote: Yeah, it really doesn't look much like him. I was also confused as to why Touji was included here since he is only a pilot in one episode and doesn't actually get to do anything.

[]: Post by Opteron-O3 » Fri Apr 06, 2007 4:50 pm BrikHaus81 wrote: Yeah, it really doesn't look much like him. I was also confused as to why Touji was included here since he is only a pilot in one episode and doesn't actually get to do anything.

[]: Post by slothen » Fri Apr 06, 2007 5:00 pm lol so the poor guy gets coerced into being a pilot, loses an arm and a leg in his first battle, and you say he doesn't even deserve to be shown as a pilot? how harsh.

[]: Post by Executor » Fri Apr 06, 2007 5:00 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: BrikHaus81 wrote: Yeah, it really doesn't look much like him. I was also confused as to why Touji was included here since he is only a pilot in one episode and doesn't actually get to do anything.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Fri Apr 06, 2007 6:05 pm slothen wrote: lol so the poor guy gets coerced into being a pilot, loses an arm and a leg in his first battle, and you say he doesn't even deserve to be shown as a pilot? how harsh.

[]: Post by slothen » Fri Apr 06, 2007 6:10 pm BrikHaus81 wrote: slothen wrote: lol so the poor guy gets coerced into being a pilot, loses an arm and a leg in his first battle, and you say he doesn't even deserve to be shown as a pilot? how harsh.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Fri Apr 06, 2007 6:19 pm slothen wrote: BrikHaus81 wrote: slothen wrote: lol so the poor guy gets coerced into being a pilot, loses an arm and a leg in his first battle, and you say he doesn't even deserve to be shown as a pilot? how harsh.

[]: Post by slothen » Fri Apr 06, 2007 6:20 pm because they were never pilots. Duh.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Fri Apr 06, 2007 6:23 pm slothen wrote: because they were never pilots. Duh.

[]: Post by slothen » Fri Apr 06, 2007 6:29 pm exactly. Only pilots are on this poster. So we have 5 pilots. Of those, Kaworu gets the least screen time. And he's evil. And he doesn't appear until late in the series. Thus he's somewhere on the poster where I can't be bothered to look for him. The other four characters are introduced early and developed over a long period of time, thus they get the foreground. Although really, I didn't even notice the poster was JUST pilots until you mentioned it :P is that him on the left behind Asuka?

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Fri Apr 06, 2007 6:36 pm slothen wrote: is that him on the left behind Asuka?

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 06, 2007 9:01 pm oi.... The only thing Toji loses is his LEG, NOT his arm. The scrapped scene from EoE is proof of this (using both arms to shoot the basket as he sits in his wheelchair) Anyway, Suzuhara Toji is the 4th Children (that's right, ChildREN, there's more than one of 'em, you know ;)), you first meet him in episode 3 when he's pissed at Shinji because the former's little sister was injured in the "robot incident". (hehe, episode 3 was the first Eva episode I watched when getting into the show, so it's kinda nostalgic for me. ) They end up becoming good friends though, although it sucks how Shinji feels guilty about Toji's acciedent when it wasn't Shin-chan's fault.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 06, 2007 9:50 pm Answer: Touji Thread: Locked
